title: Should Eddie Howe be on notice the rest of the season, or are Newcastle suffering from bad luck?
summary: Should Eddie Howe be on notice the rest of the season, or are Newcastle suffering from bad luck?. Newcastle United are slumping with a stale attack and a too-open defense. Eddie Howe is still young an...
content:
Managerial stability and longevity are both boons for Premier League clubs, and Newcastle United have to weight that against some real warning signs under the watch of boss Eddie Howe.
